title: Codex visual review S02 panel a1

payload.notes: Codex VISUAL second-model review completed (GPT-5.5 xhigh) independent read of S02_panel_a01.png, mode=baked, CLI -i path, RC=0。三人身份锁稳定：researcher 黑框眼镜+黑 T 居暖侧，executor 蓝衣棕发无须全片最高跳、reviewer 绿衣黑发有须抱臂稳落居暗侧，与 trio_identity_sheet/identity_refs 一致，identity_consistency=5。像素风格整体统一、暖屋与 #0A0E27 暗世界沿屏幕对角 seam 切分干净，style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线从 researcher 离键的手导向骑缝 terminal card 再到觉醒的 duo，composition_readability=5。本稿为 baked-duo：baked CJK 气泡与英文终端字面清晰、拼写正确，baked_text_quality=5；观察到的字面文本 observed_literals=["aris - hand-off", "$ aris run", "--task dllm-schema-keyword-first", "--deadline 24h", "ARIS ONLINE", "DDL T-24:00:00", "> session started · executor + reviewer awake"]，语义与 B02 hand-off 语境一致，content_corruption_present=false。面板内除 baked 文本外无零星模拟字形残留 stray_text_present=false；安全区被 baked 气泡与 terminal card 占据 safezone_present=false（baked 模式预期内）。seam 边缘与霓虹网格处轻度粒子伪影，artifact_severity=1（轻微，不构成 beat 级缺陷）。与 Gemini 在 identity 上零分歧（disagreeId=0）。整体 KEEP 倾向：身份/语义/构图稳，烤字满分，无内容变形。
